message:
Refactor: code formatting and style consistency improvements

Apply consistent code style across multiple command modules following
Rust formatting conventions and clippy recommendations.

**dep.rs:**
- Reformat match arms to use block expressions when returning complex
  function calls, improving readability of the dispatch logic
- Consistent indentation for multi-line function arguments

**label.rs:**
- Simplify single-expression match arms by removing unnecessary
  block braces

**lint.rs:**
- Remove unnecessary borrow on storage parameter (clippy suggestion)
- Pass storage directly since the function takes a reference

**stats.rs:**
- Remove unnecessary borrows on storage parameters in compute_summary
  and compute_label_breakdown calls
- Aligns with Rust's deref coercion for reference parameters

**config/mod.rs:**
- Sort imports alphabetically within use statement
- Reformat function signature to consistent multi-line style
- Expand import_from_jsonl call for better parameter visibility

These changes have no functional impact but improve code readability
and reduce noise in future clippy runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,22 +34,12 @@ pub fn execute(command: &DepCommands, json: bool, cli: &config::CliOverrides) ->
     match command {
         DepCommands::Add(args) => dep_add(args, storage, &resolver, &all_ids, &actor, json),
         DepCommands::Remove(args) => dep_remove(args, storage, &resolver, &all_ids, &actor, json),
-        DepCommands::List(args) => dep_list(
-            args,
-            storage,
-            &resolver,
-            &all_ids,
-            &external_db_paths,
-            json,
-        ),
-        DepCommands::Tree(args) => dep_tree(
-            args,
-            storage,
-            &resolver,
-            &all_ids,
-            &external_db_paths,
-            json,
-        ),
+        DepCommands::List(args) => {
+            dep_list(args, storage, &resolver, &all_ids, &external_db_paths, json)
+        }
+        DepCommands::Tree(args) => {
+            dep_tree(args, storage, &resolver, &all_ids, &external_db_paths, json)
+        }
         DepCommands::Cycles(args) => dep_cycles(args, storage, json),
     }?;
